testCaseDescription: Verifies that a Candidate can retrieve all active job listings and that each job contains required fields: title, company, location, type, and active status.

steps.step: Recruiter1 creates a job to ensure at least one active listing exists: POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Backend Developer",
  "description": "Java Spring Boot developer role",
  "location": "Pune, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "10,00,000 - 18,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Job created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "title": "Backend Developer",
    "description": "Java Spring Boot developer role",
    "location": "Pune, India",
    "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
    "salary": "10,00,000 - 18,00,000",
    "type": "FULL_TIME",
    "active": true
  }
}

steps.step: Candidate1 retrieves all active job listings: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Assert: HTTP 200, data array is not empty, first job has id, title, company, location, type fields
steps.responseBody:
Assertions:
- status code == 200
- data != null
- data.size() >= 1
- data[0].title != null
- data[0].company != null
- data[0].location != null
- data[0].type != null
- data[0].active == true

testCaseDescription: Verifies that a Candidate can successfully apply for an active job. Asserts that the application is created with status PENDING, and the response contains the correct job ID and cover letter.

steps.step: Recruiter1 creates a new job to obtain a valid jobId: POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Backend Developer",
  "description": "Java Spring Boot developer role",
  "location": "Pune, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "10,00,000 - 18,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Extract jobId from the job creation response
Candidate1 submits a job application: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Assert: HTTP 200, status=PENDING, coverLetter matches, job.id matches created job
steps.responseBody:
Assertions:
- status code == 200
- data.status == PENDING
- data.coverLetter == submitted coverLetter
- data.job.id == created jobId
- data.id != null (application ID captured for further tests)

testCaseDescription: Verifies that a Candidate can retrieve their own applications after submitting one, and that the tracked application shows the correct status (PENDING), cover letter, and job reference.

steps.step: Recruiter1 creates a new job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Backend Developer",
  "description": "Java Spring Boot developer role",
  "location": "Pune, India",
  "company": "HireFlow Technologies",
  "salary": "10,00,000 - 18,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Candidate1 applies for the job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Candidate1 retrieves their application list: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
Assert: HTTP 200, application list not empty, submitted application found by ID, status=PENDING, coverLetter matches
steps.responseBody:
Assertions:
- status code == 200
- data != null
- data.size() >= 1
- submitted application found in list by application ID
- trackedApp.status == PENDING
- trackedApp.coverLetter == submitted coverLetter
